meta.implementation: CSS position:absolute with top% and left%
meta.pulse_animation: 2s infinite, ring expands 1x to 1.5x scale, opacity 1 to 0

hotspots.name: Diamond Encoded Patterns
hotspots.description: Embossed grid protocols containing the original Grid architecture. Ancient Khemet legal code translated to visual pattern.

hotspots.name: Micro-Thin Etched Silver Edge
hotspots.description: Integrated end-cap detail with sacred geometry lining visible only at specific angles.

hotspots.name: Primary Legal Key Emblem
hotspots.description: Diamond within circle. Silver on charcoal. The primary access key to all Grid protocols.

hotspots.name: Readable Legal Text
hotspots.description: Invoked diamond patterns. Ancient Khemet legal code translated to code.

hotspots.name: Circuit Line Sole Edge
hotspots.description: Grounding conductors with kinetic absorption sole. Every step connects to the Grid.

hotspots.name: Geometric Stabilization Core
hotspots.description: Multifaceted stabilizer array with asymmetrical energy channels and converging field emitters.

hotspots.name: Reactive Armor Panels
hotspots.description: Segmented dissipation plates with semi-transparent energy fissures between segments.

hotspots.name: Tactical Grip Surface
hotspots.description: Knuckle disruption emitters allow physical stabilization of destabilized matter and energy.

hotspots.name: Central Axis Stabilization Spine
hotspots.description: Energy bleed port with dissipation vents. Stabilization field radiates from this central point.

hotspots.name: Grounding Conductors
hotspots.description: Kinetic absorption sole. The suit stabilizes before the destabilization event is apparent.

hotspots.name: Asymmetric Armor Plate
hotspots.description: Red fracture channels trace across aggressive angular geometry. Not circuit light — bleed, not flow.

hotspots.name: Pauldron Fracture Points
hotspots.description: Aggressive angular geometry with fracture channel emergence points.

hotspots.name: Vein Circuit Fracture Panel
hotspots.description: Semi-transparent forearm panel revealing red energy fracture network beneath the surface.

hotspots.name: Diagonal Spine Fracture Channel
hotspots.description: Primary disruption conduit running diagonally — the direct inverse of Ramet's stabilization spine.

hotspots.name: Knuckle Energy Emergence
hotspots.description: Tactical grip surface with visible energy emergence at each knuckle point.

hotspots.name: Orbital Panel Array
hotspots.description: Geometric orbital pattern with system status indicators. Cyan circuit lines converge at holographic trigger points.

hotspots.name: Text-Data String Display
hotspots.description: Holographic interface trigger points with gold circuit lines converging at wrist for system projection.

hotspots.name: Angular Architectural Plates
hotspots.description: Gold trim with layered tact-armor design. Angular construction mirrors architectural blueprints.

hotspots.name: Tactical Belt System
hotspots.description: Deep forest green with gold edge line. System access ports along the band for direct grid connection.

hotspots.name: Architectural Map Network
hotspots.description: Gold orbit-line patterns forming complete architectural blueprints. Spine channel runs full height.

hotspots.name: Targeting Geometry Panel
hotspots.description: Dark panel with embedded geometric targeting array. Purple circuit lines trace precision pathways.

hotspots.name: Precision-Stream Interface
hotspots.description: Scalpel mode active — reactive scripts converging to wrist for targeted data operations.

hotspots.name: Angular Plates & Purple Trim
hotspots.description: Layered armor construction with embedded purple geometric circuit lines.

hotspots.name: Tactical Code-Strap Belt
hotspots.description: PRECISION_FOCUS_v1.0 designation. Intel focus channels with ancient precision symbols.

hotspots.name: Precision Matrix Core
hotspots.description: Ancient precision symbols column running spine-length. Intel focus channels embedded in matrix.

hotspots.name: Resonance Core Panel
hotspots.description: Purple-dominant energy spiral manifestation. Resonance core replaces Kairo's holographic projection.

hotspots.name: Resonance-Stream Interface
hotspots.description: Scalpel mode with resonance frequency — dissolves rather than cuts.

hotspots.name: Angular Plates & Deep Purple Trim
hotspots.description: Same layered construction as Kairo but with deeper purple energy saturation.

hotspots.name: Frequency Calibration Belt
hotspots.description: PRECISION_FOCUS_v1.0 — same designation, different frequency calibration.

hotspots.name: Resonance Matrix Core
hotspots.description: Ancient precision symbols with purple resonance glow. Same column, different energy signature.

hotspots.name: Royal Blue Armor Plates
hotspots.description: Embedded gold hieroglyphic symbols. Each symbol is a compressed data protocol from the ancient Grid.

hotspots.name: Data-Stream Interface
hotspots.description: Reactive script display with gold hieroglyphic data streams. Ancient knowledge translated to tactical readout.

hotspots.name: Layered Armor Construction
hotspots.description: Articulation joints allowing full range of motion while maintaining hieroglyphic integrity.

hotspots.name: PROTECTION_STREAM_v4.1
hotspots.description: Tactical belt with code-strap. Protection stream designation marks active guardian protocol.

hotspots.name: Power Matrix Core
hotspots.description: Symbols of power and knowledge running spine-length. The oldest active code in the Grid.
